name: Two Harbors Investments Corp 7.625% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Two Harbors Investments Corp 7.625% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a class of preferred equity issued by Two Harbors Investment Corp. The preferred stock has a liquidation preference and pays cumulative dividends. It is a REIT.
